sglang.title: sgl-router: experimental Rust HTTP router for SGLang worker pools
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Draft PR for the experimental sgl-router project under experimental/sgl-router/ — a slim, Rust-based HTTP router that fronts a pool of SGLang inference workers. Targets the same role as the model-gateway sidecar (SMG) but as a single self-contained Rust binary instead of a Python service.

sglang.title: fix(docker): generate Cargo.lock in chef stage for sgl-router build
sglang.author: Kangyan-Zhou
sglang.bodyExcerpt:

experimental/sgl-router/Cargo.lock is gitignored by the repo-wide # Rust lib rule at .gitignore:238, so a fresh-checkout docker build -f docker/sgl-router.Dockerfile . fails with Cargo.lock: not found at the chef-stage COPY.
This broke the new nightly-experimental-sgl-router-docker workflow

sglang.title: [perf][spec decoding] Skip full-vocab softmax in EAGLE draft when topk == 1
sglang.author: Qiaolin-Yu
sglang.bodyExcerpt: The greedy spec-decoding path (--speculative-eagle-topk 1) currently runs a full-vocab torch.softmax + torch.max for every draft step and again for _draft_extend_for_decode (both eager and inside the captured draft-extend cuda graph). With topk == 1 the draft tree is a single path, so topk_p does no

sglang.title: Zero `req_pool_indices` padding in cuda-graph populate
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt: Pair seq_lens.fill_(seq_len_fill_value) with req_pool_indices.zero_() in cuda-graph populate. Padded rows then resolve to the reserved req_pool slot 0 whose req_to_token[0, :] row stays all-zero from init, so captured attention's dummy reads land on slot 0 instead of stale req_to_token left by an ea

sglang.title: [diffusion] Cache fp32 layernorm params
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This change ports the FP32LayerNorm parameter-cache part from FastVideo PR hao-ai-lab/FastVideo#1245. The Wan diffusion path casts LayerNorm parameters to fp32 every forward. During inference the parameters do not change, so the fp32 copies can be cached per module and refreshed only when

sglang.title: [diffusion] Add CFG gating for denoising
sglang.author: BBuf
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This change ports Adaptive Guidance from FastVideo PR hao-ai-lab/FastVideo#1372. Classifier-free guidance runs conditional and unconditional model forwards every denoise step. After a configurable gate step, the unconditional branch can reuse the cached cond - uncond delta from the previo

sglang.title: support kimi 2.5/6 lora (logprob diff exist)
sglang.author: nanjiangwill
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Adds Kimi K2.5 / K2.6 LoRA support to the `sglang-miles` branch:

MoE LoRA: `experts_shared_outer_loras` layout. `gate_up_proj_moe` has shared A (`(slot, 1, 2r, hidden)`) + per-expert B; `down_proj_moe` has the inverse. `LoRAMemoryPool` initializes A and B independently per target so a shared Tensor

sglang.author: mispa-ms

Motivation
The diffusion subsystem (multimodal_gen) has no layerwise NVTX support today, so an nsys capture of a diffusion run shows only CUDA kernel timelines with no logical structure. The srt LLM-side already provides --enable-layerwise-nvtx-marker via sglang.srt.utils.nvtx_pytorch_hooks.PytHooks

vllm.title: [GDN] GDN Prefill kernel for SM100
vllm.author: gau-nernst
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR adds an in-tree GDN prefill kernel for SM100. The kernel was originally developed by team CUDA_ERROR_UNKNOWN (@simveit, @yue-zhang-2025, @mayankagarwals, @zcnrex) for  MLSys 2026 FlashInfer Kernel competition in CUDA C++. I ported the kernel to CuteDSL to enjoy JIT benefits like adap

vllm.title: [CPU] Enable non-divisible GQA for decode workitems in mixed batches
vllm.author: zhejiangxiaomai
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
Enable CPU GQA for non-divisible q/kv head ratios on decode workitems, including mixed batches.
Previously, CPU GQA was only enabled when max_num_q_per_iter % q_heads_per_kv == 0, which was too restrictive for decode. This change relaxes the condition to q_heads_per_kv <= max_num_q_per_iter
